ignorePatterns:
**/node_modules/**
**/dist/**
**/.next/**
packages/web/screenshots/**
docs/assets/**
artifacts/**
scripts/**
packages/web/src/lib/mock-data.ts
pnpm-lock.yaml
instructions: Review this repository as a pnpm TypeScript monorepo for orchestrating parallel AI coding agents. Prioritize correctness and regressions in session lifecycle, worktree isolation, SCM integrations, plugin contracts, and web/API state propagation. Favor high-signal comments over formatting nits.

rules.rule: For production code that executes external programs or shells, require execFile or spawn with argv arrays and explicit timeouts. Flag uses of exec, string-built shell commands, or untrusted values flowing into tmux, git, gh, AppleScript, GraphQL, or similar OS/API command surfaces.
Treat JSON from files, metadata, CLI output, web requests, or external APIs as untrusted. Require try/catch or equivalent validation before property access, especially in non-test code.
Runtime TypeScript code must keep ESM import hygiene: local imports use explicit .js extensions and Node builtins use the node: prefix.
Plugin packages must import contracts from @composio/ao-core, export manifest and create, and default export `{ manifest, create } satisfies PluginModule<T>` using the correct slot interface.

Flag missing cleanup for timers, event listeners, streams, temp files, subprocesses, tmux resources, and long-lived connections. Teardown paths must run on disconnect, destroy, exit, and partial failure paths.

Do not fork or silently drift contracts that already exist in packages/core/src/types.ts or config schemas. Shared behavior changes should reuse or update the core source of truth rather than duplicating local types.
